properties.name: Community Recreation Center Meetup Spot
properties.desc: This is the meetup spot mainly used for our guided group on Raid Days/Hours where we walk together to clear as many Gyms as possible.

properties.name: Santa Clara Tennis Center Meetup Spot
properties.desc: This is the meetup spot mainly used for our guided group for Max Battle events where we walk together to clear as many Power Spots as possible.
